displayTitle: Win the Signal Before You Touch the Gain

beats.narration: Every eddy current display is a contest between signal and noise. Gain amplifies both equally, so it never moves the ratio.

payload.title: GAIN IS A MAGNIFIER
payload.sub: SNR is won earlier in the chain — not on the gain knob.

beats.narration: Start every noisy test with one diagnostic: lift the probe into the air. Noise that stays is electrical. Noise that dies was born in the part.

payload.heading: First move: lift the probe into the air

beats.narration: Frequency is the first lever. At ten kilohertz, lift-off and the crack run almost parallel, so wobble trips the alarm. Raise frequency: the crack swings vertical.

payload.heading: Frequency opens the angle
payload.note: ROTATION AIMS THE PATTERN — FREQUENCY OPENS THE ANGLE

beats.narration: Then steer, filter, and rebuild the probe. Rotate lift-off horizontal, band-pass the drift and fuzz, and change what the coil sees.

payload.heading: The rest of the Level II toolbox

beats.narration: No fix is real until the reference standard says so. Change one thing, re-standardize, and measure three to one at production speed.

payload.sub: A quiet screen could just mean the test went blind.
